response.justification: Strong generalist engineer with 13+ years of experience, recent exposure to AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, and solid full-stack credentials in TypeScript/Node.js. However, the resume shows only limited explicit experience with production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and major cloud platforms at the depth expected for a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer. Cloud experience is mostly AWS CDK at Optilyz, and there is no clear evidence of customer-facing technical leadership or evaluation/observability frameworks for AI systems.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot engineering experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js background
Current hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, and founding GISCollective
concerns: Limited demonstrated production GenAI/RAG/vector database experience versus the 8-year AI requirement
No clear customer-facing forward-deployed or discovery-session leadership history
Cloud experience appears narrow (AWS CDK only); no GCP/Azure or multi-cloud AI architecture evidence

key_factors.factor: Current MCP and agentic tooling work
